global.description: The ad features a vibrant yellow background with a clear promotional message.
global.main_message: Promoting a 2-for-1 late-night deal with a discount.

elements.label: yellow background
elements.description: A solid yellow background that fills the entire canvas, providing a vibrant and eye-catching base.

elements.label: QuickFork logo
elements.description: A stylized logo at the top, featuring the text 'QuickFork' in a bold, modern font.

elements.label: 2-for-1 offer
elements.description: Large, bold text in the center stating '2-for-1 tonight' that is easy to read and grabs attention.

elements.label: Late-night deals
elements.description: Smaller text below the main offer that reads 'Late-night deals available', providing additional context.

elements.label: 30% discount
elements.description: A prominent badge displaying '-30%' in a contrasting color, indicating a discount on the offer.

elements.label: Order now button
elements.description: A clear call-to-action button labeled 'Order now' in bold text, designed to encourage immediate action.

elements.label: two squares icon
elements.description: An icon depicting two overlapping squares, symbolizing the 2-for-1 offer, placed near the discount badge.

elements.label: sale banner
elements.description: A banner at the top right corner with the word 'SALE' in bold letters, adding urgency to the ad.
elements.text_content: 2-for-1 tonight Late-night deals available 30% Order now

elements.label: unknown element
elements.description: An unspecified element that does not clearly fit into the defined roles, possibly decorative.

elements.label: unknown element
elements.description: Another unspecified element that does not clearly fit into the defined roles, possibly decorative.
